column1: Susan knew it was Dave's big day. He had finally got an interview with one of the__________companies in the country. (EXCITING)
Ever since his______________job, Dave had dreamed about a chance like this and now he was really nervous. (ONE)
"Don't worry", Susan__________him. "I'm sure everything is going to be all right". (TELL)
Dave hoped she was right. The job was well paid, so if he managed to impress_________in the interview, it would mean a big improvement in their lives. (THEY)
But still, he couldn't help_____________. What if they asked him a really difficult question in the interview? (WORRY)
"Have you got everything?' asked Susan. "___________there something you need to do before you go?" (NOT BE)
Dave couldn't think of anything he_______________. He had his papers, his briefcase and his umbrella. (FORGET)
"Oh, you did forget!" said Susan. "What present should husbands give their__________every morning?" (WIFE)
Then Dave remembered that he always gave Susan a kiss before he left the house every day. He___________terrible for forgetting. (FEEL)
